accounting.title: Accounting Settings

accounting.defaultCommissionDesc: Automatically applied to each invoice when creating a settlement. Can be edited per invoice manually.
accounting.howItWorks1: When creating a settlement for a workshop, the default rate is automatically applied to each invoice
accounting.howItWorks2: You can manually adjust the rate per invoice before confirming the settlement
accounting.howItWorks3: Example: 1,000 SAR invoice with 10% commission → 100 SAR for platform, 900 SAR for workshop
accounting.commissionDescription: Automatically applied to each invoice when creating a settlement. Can be edited per invoice manually.
